title: Child protection policy - Ministry of Education
content:
Kaupapa here tiaki tamariki

## Child protection policy
Our child protection policy applies to all employees, contractors and volunteers working for us.
We are required to have a child protection policy under The Children's Act 2014.
Children’s Act 2014 – New Zealand Legislation

## Read our child protection policy
Download the child protection policy.
- Child protection policies for schools
- Child protection policies for early learning services
- Report suspected abuse or neglect of children and young people by adults
